# viettelidc_vks_addon (Resource)

Provides a VKS Kubernetes Add-on resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# CÃ i Ä‘áº·t Kubernetes Addon (VÃ­ dá»¥: dashboard)
resource "viettelidc_vks_addon" "dashboard" {
  cluster_id = "1477"
  name       = "dashboard"
  version    = "6.0.8-vtdc-1.1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (String) ID of the Kubernetes Cluster.
- `name` (String) Name of the addon (e.g. csi-nfs, prometheus).
- `version` (String) Version of the addon to install.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the addon resource, formatted as cluster_id/addon_name.
- `status` (String) Status of the addon.
